zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Meyrick於1513年出生在威爾士安格萊波多爾根時，他的父親Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn30歲，母親Margaret verch Roland30歲。他於1545年與Sage Griffith Davis在威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年12月10日在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Meyrick于1513年出生在威尔士安格萊波多爾根时，他的父亲Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn30岁，母亲Margaret verch Roland30岁。他于1545年与Sage Griffith Davis在威尔士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年12月10日在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Meyrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Meyrick was born in 1513, in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn, was 30 and his mother, Margaret verch Roland, was 30. He married Sage Griffith Davis in 1545, in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 December 1568, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Meyrick est né en 1513, à Bodorgan, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret verch Roland, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sage Griffith Davis en 1545, à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1568, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Meyrick 1513 in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn 30 und seine Mutter Margaret verch Roland 30. Er hat 1545 in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales Sage Griffith Davis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1568 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Meyrick è nato il nel 1513 nel Bodorgan, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret verch Roland, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sage Griffith Davis nel 1545, nel St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 dicembre 1568, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Meyrickが1513年にウェールズアングレセイボドルガンで生まれた時，父Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellynは30歳，母Margaret verch Rolandは30歳であった。1545年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズでSage Griffith Davisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年12月10日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Meyrick(이)가 1513년 웨일스 앤글레시 보도르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret verch Roland(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1545년 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에서 Sage Griffith Davis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 12월 10일 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Meyrick nasceu em 1513, em Bodorgan, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret verch Roland, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sage Griffith Davis em 1545, em St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1568, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Meyrick родился в 1513 г. в местности бодорган, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret verch Roland, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sage Griffith Davis в 1545 г. в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 декабря 1568 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Sage Griffith Davis en 1545, en St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1568, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 55 años.
